title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Nvidia's Pixel Diffusion (PiD) is a free, open-source AI image model designed for high-resolution 4K image generation. The video demonstrates PiD workflows integrated with ComfyUI and compares it against SeedVR2, with examples of text-to-image and upscaling applications.
